nasb.text: For so it was commanded me by the word of the Lord, saying, ‘You shall eat no bread, nor drink water, nor return by the way which you came.’ ”

esv.text: for so was it commanded me by the word of the Lord, saying, ‘You shall neither eat bread nor drink water nor return by the way that you came.’”

cnv.text: 因為有耶和華的話吩咐我說：‘你不可吃飯喝水，也不可從你去的原路回來。’”

ccb.text: 因为耶和华吩咐我不可在伯特利用饭喝水，也不可原路返回。”
